curation_notes: Re-curated with improved hints. The patch modifies a single file (SimpleParameterList.java) with 1 non-test source file changed. The vulnerability is in the toString(int, boolean) method which serializes parameter values into SQL text for simple query mode. The pre-patch code directly concatenated parameter values into SQL strings; for text parameters it used Utils.escapeLiteral() but on failure fell back to appending the unescaped value, and for binary numeric types it returned raw toString representations without wrapping in parentheses. The patch introduces a quoteAndCast() helper that properly escapes literals and wraps all values in parentheses to prevent SQL injection via line comment generation (double-dash from negation). L1/L3 hints differentiated: L1 covers the broad parameter binding layer, L3 narrows to simple query mode parameter serialization. No sibling files share the same vulnerability pattern — CompositeParameterList delegates to SimpleParameterList. Locations derived from the patch diff.
